changeSet.author: kanix
changeSet.comment: Add cla_version and profile_visibility columns to contributor table. cla_version tracks which CLA version the contributor accepted. profile_visibility controls whether the contributor profile is visible in public endpoints (default: public).
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE contributor ADD CONSTRAINT ck_contributor_profile_visibility CHECK (profile_visibility IN ('public', 'private'));

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE contributor DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS ck_contributor_profile_visibility;
